title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA BIRCH GROVE HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Services include well baby/child check-ups, annual exams/physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, care for chronic conditions, and general medical care. Specializes in care for patients with mental illnesses and substance use disorder. 910 S Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Appointments (541) 618-1300 Main (541) 618-1380 Care Team After-hours nurse line (541) 535-6239 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
